title: Golden Globes 2026: Awards Odds and Predictions - EntertainmentNow
text: The 83rd Golden Globe Awards ceremony takes place January 11, hosted by Nikki Glaser at the Beverly Hilton, airing at 8:00 p.m. ET on CBS and Paramount+. Best Film Comedy/Musical One Battle After Another dominates with 93-95 percent winning probability across forecasting sources. Best Film Drama Sinners holds advantage at 67 percent while Hamnet emerged as challenger. Best Actress Drama Jessie Buckley leads with projections exceeding 90 percent. Best Actor Drama Wagner Moura sits at approximately 72 percent, ahead of Michael B. Jordan at 25 percent. Best Actor Comedy/Musical Timothée Chalamet leads at 80 percent with Leonardo DiCaprio at 11 percent. Supporting categories show greater unpredictability.
